# Order Tracking

Each shipment produces a tracking number that is emailed to the customer as soon as the carrier scans the parcel. Live tracking status is also visible from the order history page inside the customer account. The tracking details can take up to twelve hours to appear after the shipping confirmation email goes out.

[Source: shipping_options.md#order-tracking]
